sqlMap.sql: id, subcontractName, contractNos, projectIds, type, state, callbackState, facilitatorId, facilitatorName, bankInfo, bankAccount, officeCode, profitDepCode, subcontractNo, isAccrued, isInvoiced, subcontractAmount, reason, remark, effectiveFrom, effectiveTo, zrApproveTime, createBy, createTime, updateBy, updateTime, customInfo, orgId
sqlMap.select:
select
from pm_subcontract_project_header where id = #id#
sqlMap.insert:
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into pm_subcontract_project_header (subcontractName, contractNos, projectIds, type, state, callbackState, facilitatorId, officeCode, profitDepCode, facilitatorName, bankInfo, bankAccount, subcontractNo, isAccrued, isInvoiced, subcontractAmount, reason, remark, effectiveFrom, effectiveTo, zrApproveTime, createBy, createTime, updateBy, updateTime, orgId, customInfo) values (#subcontractName#, #contractNos#, #projectIds#, #type#, #state#, #callbackState#, #facilitatorId#, #officeCode#, #profitDepCode#, #facilitatorName#, #bankInfo#, #bankAccount#, #subcontractNo#, #isAccrued#, #isInvoiced#, #subcontractAmount#, #reason#, #remark#, #effectiveFrom#, #effectiveTo#, #zrApproveTime#, #createBy#, #createTime#, #updateBy#, #updateTime#, #orgId#, #customInfo:JSON#)

SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into pm_subcontract_project_header
subcontractName contractNos projectIds type state callbackState facilitatorId facilitatorName bankInfo bankAccount officeCode profitDepCode subcontractNo isAccrued isInvoiced subcontractAmount reason remark effectiveFrom effectiveTo zrApproveTime createBy createTime updateBy updateTime orgId customInfo
#subcontractName# #contractNos# #projectIds# #type# #state# #callbackState# #facilitatorId# #facilitatorName# #bankInfo# #bankAccount# #officeCode# #profitDepCode# #subcontractNo# #isAccrued# #isInvoiced# #subcontractAmount# #reason# #remark# #effectiveFrom# #effectiveTo# #zrApproveTime# #createBy# #createTime# #updateBy# #updateTime# #orgId# #customInfo:JSON#
sqlMap.update:
update pm_subcontract_project_header
subcontractName = #subcontractName# contractNos = #contractNos# projectIds = #projectIds# type = #type# state = #state# callbackState = #callbackState# facilitatorId = #facilitatorId# facilitatorName = #facilitatorName# bankInfo = #bankInfo# bankAccount = #bankAccount# officeCode = #officeCode# profitDepCode = #profitDepCode# subcontractNo = #subcontractNo# isAccrued = #isAccrued# isInvoiced = #isInvoiced# subcontractAmount = #subcontractAmount# reason = #reason# remark = #remark# effectiveFrom = #effectiveFrom# effectiveTo = #effectiveTo# zrApproveTime = #zrApproveTime# createBy = #createBy# createTime = #createTime# updateBy = #updateBy# updateTime = #updateTime# orgId = #orgId#
customInfo = JSON_MERGE_PATCH(IFNULL(customInfo, "{}"), #customInfo:JSON# )
where id = #id#

update pm_subcontract_project_header set subcontractName = #subcontractName#, contractNos = #contractNos#, projectIds = #projectIds#, type = #type#, state = #state#, callbackState = #callbackState#, facilitatorId = #facilitatorId#, facilitatorName = #facilitatorName#, bankInfo = #bankInfo#, bankAccount = #bankAccount#, officeCode = #officeCode#, profitDepCode = #profitDepCode#, subcontractNo = #subcontractNo#, isAccrued = #isAccrued#, isInvoiced = #isInvoiced#, subcontractAmount = #subcontractAmount#, reason = #reason#, remark = #remark#, effectiveFrom = #effectiveFrom#, effectiveTo = #effectiveTo#, zrApproveTime = #zrApproveTime#, createBy = #createBy#, createTime = #createTime#, updateBy = #updateBy#, updateTime = #updateTime#, orgId = #orgId#,
customInfo = JSON_MERGE_PATCH(IFNULL(customInfo, "{}"), #customInfo:JSON# ) where id = #id#
sqlMap.select:
select * from pm_subcontract_project_header
id = #id# subcontractName = #subcontractName# contractNos = #contractNos# projectIds = #projectIds# type = #type# state = #state# callbackState = #callbackState# facilitatorId = #facilitatorId# facilitatorName = #facilitatorName# bankInfo = #bankInfo# bankAccount = #bankAccount# officeCode = #officeCode# profitDepCode = #profitDepCode# subcontractNo = #subcontractNo# isAccrued = #isAccrued# isInvoiced = #isInvoiced# subcontractAmount = #subcontractAmount# reason = #reason# remark = #remark# effectiveFrom >= #effectiveFrom# #effectiveTo# <= IFNULL(effectiveTo, "9999-12-31") zrApproveTime = #zrApproveTime# createBy = #createBy# createTime = #createTime# updateBy = #updateBy# updateTime = #updateTime# orgId = #orgId#

select count(1) from pm_subcontract_project_header
id = #id# subcontractName = #subcontractName# contractNos = #contractNos# projectIds = #projectIds# type = #type# state = #state# callbackState = #callbackState# facilitatorId = #facilitatorId# facilitatorName = #facilitatorName# bankInfo = #bankInfo# bankAccount = #bankAccount# officeCode = #officeCode# profitDepCode = #profitDepCode# subcontractNo = #subcontractNo# isAccrued = #isAccrued# isInvoiced = #isInvoiced# subcontractAmount = #subcontractAmount# reason = #reason# remark = #remark# effectiveFrom >= #effectiveFrom# #effectiveTo# <= IFNULL(effectiveTo, "9999-12-31") zrApproveTime = #zrApproveTime# createBy = #createBy# createTime = #createTime# updateBy = #updateBy# updateTime = #updateTime# orgId = #orgId#
sqlMap.sql:
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT t.`subcontractId`, t.confirmTime, t.paymentTime, t.remark, maxPay.paidAmount, t.customInfo FROM `pm_subcontract_project_payment` t INNER JOIN (SELECT
MAX(id) AS maxPayId, SUM( IF( paymentTime IS NOT NULL, CONVERT( REPLACE(IFNULL(customInfo ->> '$$.paidAmount', amount), ",", ""), DECIMAL (25, 2) ), 0 ) ) AS paidAmount FROM `pm_subcontract_project_payment` GROUP BY subcontractId) maxPay ON t.id = maxPay.maxPayId ) spp ON spp.subcontractId = h.`id`
sqlMap.select:
SELECT h.*, d.`departmentName` AS officeName, d1.`departmentName` AS profitDepName, bd.`basicDataName` AS stateName, bd1.`basicDataName` as callbackStateName, bd2.basicDataName as typeName, CONCAT(h.createBy, "-", ui.`realName`) AS createName zrApproverTime spp.customInfo AS extInfo FROM pm_subcontract_project_header h
LEFT JOIN fnd_department d ON h.`officeCode` = d.`departmentNum` LEFT JOIN fnd_department d1 ON h.`profitDepCode` = d1.`departmentNum` LEFT JOIN `fnd_basic_data` bd ON h.`state` = bd.`basicDataId` AND bd.`dataTypeCode` = 'subcontractState' LEFT JOIN `fnd_basic_data` bd1 ON h.`callbackState` = bd1.`basicDataId` AND bd1.`dataTypeCode` = 'subcontractCbState' LEFT JOIN `fnd_basic_data` bd2 ON h.`type` = bd2.`basicDataId` AND bd2.`dataTypeCode` = 'subcontractType' LEFT JOIN fnd_user_info ui ON ui.`username` = h.`createBy`
LEFT JOIN (SELECT ach.`objId` AS subcontractId, MAX(ht.`END_TIME_`) AS zrApproverTime FROM `fnd_act_hi_comment` ach LEFT JOIN `act_hi_taskinst` ht ON ht.ID_ = ach.taskId AND ht.PROC_INST_ID_ = ach.instId WHERE ach.`result` = 1 AND ach.`procdefKey` = 'Subcontract' AND ht.`TASK_DEF_KEY_` = 'approveZRTask' GROUP BY ach.`procdefKey`, ach.`objId`) zra ON zra.subcontractId = h.`id`
LEFT JOIN `pm_subcontract_project_payment` p ON h.id = p.`subcontractId`
WHERE h.`effectiveTo` IS NULL h.id = #id# h.subcontractName like concat("%", #subcontractName#, "%") (h.contractNos like concat("%", #contractNos#, "%") or h.subcontractNo like concat("%", #contractNos#, "%")) h.projectIds like concat("%", #projectIds#, "%") h.type = #type# h.state = #state# callbackState = #callbackState# h.facilitatorId = #facilitatorId# h.facilitatorName like concat("%", #facilitatorName#, "%") h.bankInfo = #bankInfo# h.bankAccount = #bankAccount# h.officeCode = #officeCode# h.profitDepCode = #profitDepCode# h.subcontractNo = #subcontractNo# h.isAccrued = #isAccrued# isInvoiced = #isInvoiced# subcontractAmount = #subcontractAmount# h.reason = #reason# h.remark = #remark# h.effectiveFrom >= #effectiveFrom# #effectiveTo# <= IFNULL(h.effectiveTo, "9999-12-31") h.zrApproveTime = #zrApproveTime# h.createBy = #createBy# h.createTime = #createTime# h.updateBy = #updateBy# h.updateTime = #updateTime# h.orgId = #orgId#
(FIND_IN_SET(h.officeCode, #areaPower#) or FIND_IN_SET(h.profitDepCode, #areaPower#)) FIND_IN_SET(#projectId#, h.projectIds)
#customInfo.purchId# = h.`customInfo` ->> '$$.purchId'
h.createTime >= #searchStartTime# h.createTime <= #searchEndTime#
zra.zrApproverTime >= #searchStartTime# zra.zrApproverTime <= #searchEndTime#
h.zrApproveTime >= #searchStartTime# h.zrApproveTime <= #searchEndTime#
p.paymentTime >= #searchStartTime# p.paymentTime <= #searchEndTime# GROUP BY h.id
order by h.id desc

select count(DISTINCT h.id) from pm_subcontract_project_header h
h.id = #id# h.subcontractName = #subcontractName# h.contractNos = #contractNos# h.projectIds = #projectIds# h.type = #type# h.state = #state# h.callbackState = #callbackState# h.facilitatorId = #facilitatorId# h.facilitatorName = #facilitatorName# h.bankInfo = #bankInfo# h.bankAccount = #bankAccount# h.officeCode = #officeCode# h.profitDepCode = #profitDepCode# h.subcontractNo = #subcontractNo# h.isAccrued = #isAccrued# h.isInvoiced = #isInvoiced# h.subcontractAmount = #subcontractAmount# h.reason = #reason# h.remark = #remark# h.effectiveFrom >= #effectiveFrom# #effectiveTo# <= IFNULL(h.effectiveTo, "9999-12-31") h.zrApproveTime = #zrApproveTime# h.createBy = #createBy# h.createTime = #createTime# h.updateBy = #updateBy# h.updateTime = #updateTime# h.orgId = #orgId#
(FIND_IN_SET(h.officeCode, #areaPower#) or FIND_IN_SET(h.profitDepCode, #areaPower#)) FIND_IN_SET(#projectId#, h.projectIds)
#customInfo.purchId# = h.`customInfo` ->> '$$.purchId'

SELECT h.*, d.`departmentName` AS officeName, d1.`departmentName` AS profitDepName, bd.`basicDataName` AS stateName, bd1.`basicDataName` as callbackStateName, bd2.basicDataName as typeName, CONCAT(h.createBy, "-", ui.`realName`) AS createName, CONCAT( ROUND( IfNULL(spp.paidAmount, 0) / CONVERT( REPLACE(h.subcontractAmount, ',', ''), DECIMAL (25, 2) ) * 100, 2 ), "%" ) AS paidRatio,IfNULL(spp.paidAmount, 0) AS paidAmount, spp.customInfo AS extInfo zra.zrApproverTime h.zrApproveTime as zrApproverTime FROM pm_subcontract_project_header h
LEFT JOIN fnd_department d ON h.`officeCode` = d.`departmentNum` LEFT JOIN fnd_department d1 ON h.`profitDepCode` = d1.`departmentNum` LEFT JOIN `fnd_basic_data` bd ON h.`state` = bd.`basicDataId` AND bd.`dataTypeCode` = 'subcontractState' LEFT JOIN `fnd_basic_data` bd1 ON h.`callbackState` = bd1.`basicDataId` AND bd1.`dataTypeCode` = 'subcontractCbState' LEFT JOIN `fnd_basic_data` bd2 ON h.`type` = bd2.`basicDataId` AND bd2.`dataTypeCode` = 'subcontractType' LEFT JOIN fnd_user_info ui ON ui.`username` = h.`createBy`
LEFT JOIN (SELECT ach.`objId` AS subcontractId, MAX(ht.`END_TIME_`) AS zrApproverTime FROM `fnd_act_hi_comment` ach LEFT JOIN `act_hi_taskinst` ht ON ht.ID_ = ach.taskId AND ht.PROC_INST_ID_ = ach.instId WHERE ach.`result` = 1 AND ach.`procdefKey` = 'Subcontract' AND ht.`TASK_DEF_KEY_` = 'approveZRTask' GROUP BY ach.`procdefKey`, ach.`objId`) zra ON zra.subcontractId = h.`id`
LEFT JOIN `pm_subcontract_project_payment` p ON h.id = p.`subcontractId`
WHERE h.`effectiveTo` IS NULL h.id = #id# h.subcontractName like concat("%", #subcontractName#, "%") (h.contractNos like concat("%", #contractNos#, "%") or h.subcontractNo like concat("%", #contractNos#, "%")) h.projectIds like concat("%", #projectIds#, "%") h.type = #type# h.state = #state# callbackState = #callbackState# h.facilitatorId = #facilitatorId# h.facilitatorName like concat("%", #facilitatorName#, "%") h.bankInfo = #bankInfo# h.bankAccount = #bankAccount# h.officeCode = #officeCode# h.profitDepCode = #profitDepCode# h.subcontractNo = #subcontractNo# h.isAccrued = #isAccrued# isInvoiced = #isInvoiced# subcontractAmount = #subcontractAmount# h.reason = #reason# h.remark = #remark# h.effectiveFrom >= #effectiveFrom# #effectiveTo# <= IFNULL(h.effectiveTo, "9999-12-31") h.zrApproveTime = #zrApproveTime# h.createBy = #createBy# h.createTime = #createTime# h.updateBy = #updateBy# h.updateTime = #updateTime# h.orgId = #orgId#
(FIND_IN_SET(h.officeCode, #areaPower#) or FIND_IN_SET(h.profitDepCode, #areaPower#)) FIND_IN_SET(#projectId#, h.projectIds)
#customInfo.purchId# = h.`customInfo` ->> '$$.purchId'
h.createTime >= #searchStartTime# h.createTime <= #searchEndTime#
zra.zrApproverTime >= #searchStartTime# zra.zrApproverTime <= #searchEndTime#
h.zrApproveTime >= #searchStartTime# h.zrApproveTime <= #searchEndTime#
p.paymentTime >= #searchStartTime# p.paymentTime <= #searchEndTime# GROUP BY h.id
order by h.id desc
limit #displayParam.offset#, #displayParam.pagesize#

SELECT count(distinct h.id) FROM pm_subcontract_project_header h
LEFT JOIN fnd_department d ON h.`officeCode` = d.`departmentNum` LEFT JOIN fnd_department d1 ON h.`profitDepCode` = d1.`departmentNum` LEFT JOIN `fnd_basic_data` bd ON h.`state` = bd.`basicDataId` AND bd.`dataTypeCode` = 'subcontractState' LEFT JOIN `fnd_basic_data` bd1 ON h.`callbackState` = bd1.`basicDataId` AND bd1.`dataTypeCode` = 'subcontractCbState' LEFT JOIN `fnd_basic_data` bd2 ON h.`type` = bd2.`basicDataId` AND bd2.`dataTypeCode` = 'subcontractType' LEFT JOIN fnd_user_info ui ON ui.`username` = h.`createBy`
LEFT JOIN (SELECT ach.`objId` AS subcontractId, MAX(ht.`END_TIME_`) AS zrApproverTime FROM `fnd_act_hi_comment` ach LEFT JOIN `act_hi_taskinst` ht ON ht.ID_ = ach.taskId AND ht.PROC_INST_ID_ = ach.instId WHERE ach.`result` = 1 AND ach.`procdefKey` = 'Subcontract' AND ht.`TASK_DEF_KEY_` = 'approveZRTask' GROUP BY ach.`procdefKey`, ach.`objId`) zra ON zra.subcontractId = h.`id`
LEFT JOIN `pm_subcontract_project_payment` p ON h.id = p.`subcontractId`
WHERE h.`effectiveTo` IS NULL h.id = #id# h.subcontractName like concat("%", #subcontractName#, "%") (h.contractNos like concat("%", #contractNos#, "%") or h.subcontractNo like concat("%", #contractNos#, "%")) h.projectIds like concat("%", #projectIds#, "%") h.type = #type# h.state = #state# callbackState = #callbackState# h.facilitatorId = #facilitatorId# h.facilitatorName like concat("%", #facilitatorName#, "%") h.bankInfo = #bankInfo# h.bankAccount = #bankAccount# h.officeCode = #officeCode# h.profitDepCode = #profitDepCode# h.subcontractNo = #subcontractNo# h.isAccrued = #isAccrued# isInvoiced = #isInvoiced# subcontractAmount = #subcontractAmount# h.reason = #reason# h.remark = #remark# h.effectiveFrom >= #effectiveFrom# #effectiveTo# <= IFNULL(h.effectiveTo, "9999-12-31") h.zrApproveTime = #zrApproveTime# h.createBy = #createBy# h.createTime = #createTime# h.updateBy = #updateBy# h.updateTime = #updateTime# h.orgId = #orgId#
(FIND_IN_SET(h.officeCode, #areaPower#) or FIND_IN_SET(h.profitDepCode, #areaPower#)) FIND_IN_SET(#projectId#, h.projectIds)
#customInfo.purchId# = h.`customInfo` ->> '$$.purchId'
h.createTime >= #searchStartTime# h.createTime <= #searchEndTime#
zra.zrApproverTime >= #searchStartTime# zra.zrApproverTime <= #searchEndTime#
h.zrApproveTime >= #searchStartTime# h.zrApproveTime <= #searchEndTime#
p.paymentTime >= #searchStartTime# p.paymentTime <= #searchEndTime#

SELECT sph.*, bd.`basicDataName` as stateName, bd1.`basicDataName` as callbackStateName, CONCAT(sph.createBy, "-", ui.`realName`) AS createName, d.`departmentName` AS officeName, d2.`departmentName` AS profitDepName, bd2.`basicDataName` as typeName FROM pm_subcontract_project_header sph LEFT JOIN fnd_department d ON sph.`officeCode` = d.`departmentNum` LEFT JOIN fnd_department d2 ON sph.`profitDepCode` = d2.`departmentNum` LEFT JOIN `fnd_basic_data` bd ON bd.`basicDataId` = sph.`state` AND bd.`dataTypeCode` = 'subcontractState' LEFT JOIN `fnd_basic_data` bd1 ON bd1.`basicDataId` = sph.`callbackState` AND bd1.`dataTypeCode` = 'subcontractCbState' LEFT JOIN `fnd_basic_data` bd2 ON sph.`type` = bd2.`basicDataId` AND bd2.`dataTypeCode` = 'subcontractType' LEFT JOIN fnd_user_info ui ON ui.`username` = sph.`createBy` where sph.id = #id#
sqlMap.sql: id, subcontractId, projectId, barCode, itemCode, itemModel, itemName, contractNo, createTime, createBy, updateTime, updateBy
sqlMap.select:
select
from pm_subcontract_project_line where id = #id#
sqlMap.insert:
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into pm_subcontract_project_line (subcontractId, projectId, barCode, itemCode, itemModel, itemName, contractNo, createTime, createBy, updateTime, updateBy) values (#subcontractId#, #projectId#, #barCode#, #itemCode#, #itemModel#, #itemName#, #contractNo#, #createTime#, #createBy#, #updateTime#, #updateBy#)

SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into pm_subcontract_project_line
subcontractId projectId barCode itemCode itemModel itemName contractNo createTime createBy updateTime updateBy
#subcontractId# #projectId# #barCode# #itemCode# #itemModel# #itemName# #contractNo# #createTime# #createBy# #updateTime# #updateBy#
sqlMap.update:
update pm_subcontract_project_line
subcontractId = #subcontractId# projectId = #projectId# barCode = #barCode# itemCode = #itemCode# itemModel = #itemModel# itemName = #itemName# contractNo = #contractNo# createTime = #createTime# createBy = #createBy# updateTime = #updateTime# updateBy = #updateBy#
where id = #id#

update pm_subcontract_project_line set subcontractId = #subcontractId#, projectId = #projectId#, barCode = #barCode#, itemCode = #itemCode#, itemModel = #itemModel#, itemName = #itemName#, contractNo = #contractNo#, createTime = #createTime#, createBy = #createBy#, updateTime = #updateTime#, updateBy = #updateBy# where id = #id#
sqlMap.select:
select spl.*, sbr.item2 as itemCode2, fi.describe_ as itemName2, fi.itemname as itemModel2, sbr.sn2 as barCode2 from pm_subcontract_project_line spl LEFT JOIN `fb_shipment_barcode_relation` sbr ON sbr.contract = REPLACE(spl.contractNo, '-C', '') AND spl.barcode = sbr.sn1 LEFT JOIN fb_items fi ON fi.`item` = sbr.`item2`
spl.id = #id# spl.subcontractId = #subcontractId# spl.projectId = #projectId# spl.barCode = #barCode# spl.itemCode = #itemCode# spl.itemModel = #itemModel# spl.itemName = #itemName# spl.contractNo = #contractNo# spl.createTime = #createTime# spl.createBy = #createBy# spl.updateTime = #updateTime# spl.updateBy = #updateBy#

select count(1) from pm_subcontract_project_line
id = #id# subcontractId = #subcontractId# projectId = #projectId# barCode = #barCode# itemCode = #itemCode# itemModel = #itemModel# itemName = #itemName# contractNo = #contractNo# createTime = #createTime# createBy = #createBy# updateTime = #updateTime# updateBy = #updateBy#
sqlMap.insert: insert into pm_subcontract_project_line (subcontractId, projectId, itemModel, contractNo, barCode, itemCode, itemName createTime, createBy updateTime, updateBy ) Select #subcontractId#, ph.projectId, fi.`itemname` AS itemModel, t.* now(), #createBy# null, null From ( SELECT DISTINCT vsip.contract_code contractNo, vsip.barcode barCode, vsip.itemCode itemCode, vsip.itemName itemName FROM view_shipment_info_4_pm vsip LEFT JOIN view_shipment_ems_4_pm vsep ON vsep.contract_code = vsip.contract_code AND vsep.packId = vsip.packId WHERE vsip.contract_code in ($contractNos$) AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM pm_project_shipment pps1 WHERE vsip.barcode = pps1.barcode and contractNo in ($contractNos$) and projectId in ($projectIds$) ) UNION SELECT `contractNo`, `barcode` as barCode, `itemCode`,`itemName` FROM pm_project_shipment pps WHERE contractNo in ($contractNos$) and projectId in ($projectIds$) AND transferFlag != 1 AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM view_shipment_info_4_pm vsip LEFT JOIN view_shipment_ems_4_pm vsep ON vsep.contract_code = vsip.contract_code AND vsep.packId = vsip.packId WHERE FIND_IN_SET(vsip.contract_code ,REPLACE(REPLACE(#contractNos#, '-C', ''), "'",'')) AND vsip.barcode = pps.barcode) ) t LEFT JOIN fb_items fi ON fi.`item` = t.itemCode LEFT JOIN `pm_project_contract` pc ON pc.`contractNo` = t.contractNo AND pc.`contractNo` IN ($contractNos$) LEFT JOIN `pm_project_group` pg ON pc.`projectGroupCode` = pg.`projectGroupCode` LEFT JOIN `pm_project_group_relationship` gr ON gr.`projectGroupCode` = pg.`projectGroupCode` LEFT JOIN `pm_project_header` ph ON ph.`projectId` IN ($projectIds$) AND gr.`projectCode` = ph.`projectCode` WHERE ph.`projectId` IS NOT NULL AND FIND_IN_SET(t.barCode, #barCodes#) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE projectId = VALUES(projectId), barCode = VALUES(barCode), itemCode = VALUES(itemCode), itemModel = VALUES(itemModel), itemName = VALUES(itemName), contractNo = VALUES(contractNo), updateBy = #updateBy#, updateTime = now()
sqlMap.sql: id, name, code, account, bankInfo, bankAccount, receiver, email, state, effectiveFrom, effectiveTo, createBy, createTime, updateBy, updateTime
sqlMap.select:
select
from pm_subcontract_facilitator where id = #id#
sqlMap.insert:
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into pm_subcontract_facilitator (name, code, account, bankInfo, bankAccount, receiver, email, state, effectiveFrom, effectiveTo, createBy, createTime, updateBy, updateTime) values (#name#, #code#, #account#, #bankInfo#, #bankAccount#, #receiver#, #email#, #state#, #effectiveFrom#, #effectiveTo#, #createBy#, #createTime#, #updateBy#, #updateTime#)

SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into pm_subcontract_facilitator
name code account bankInfo bankAccount receiver email state effectiveFrom effectiveTo createBy createTime updateBy updateTime
#name# #code# #account# #bankInfo# #bankAccount# #receiver# #email# #state# #effectiveFrom# #effectiveTo# #createBy# #createTime# #updateBy# #updateTime#
sqlMap.update:
update pm_subcontract_facilitator
name = #name# code = #code# account = #account# bankInfo = #bankInfo# bankAccount = #bankAccount# receiver = #receiver# email = #email# state = #state# effectiveFrom = #effectiveFrom# effectiveTo = #effectiveTo# createBy = #createBy# createTime = #createTime# updateBy = #updateBy# updateTime = #updateTime#
where id = #id#

update pm_subcontract_facilitator set name = #name#, code = #code#, account = #account#, bankInfo = #bankInfo#, bankAccount = #bankAccount#, receiver = #receiver#, email = #email#, state = #state#, effectiveFrom = #effectiveFrom#, effectiveTo = #effectiveTo#, createBy = #createBy#, createTime = #createTime#, updateBy = #updateBy#, updateTime = #updateTime# where id = #id#
sqlMap.select:
select * from pm_subcontract_facilitator
id = #id# code = #code# account = #account# name like concat("%", #name#, "%") bankInfo like concat("%", #bankInfo#, "%") bankAccount = #bankAccount# receiver = #receiver# email = #email# state = #state# effectiveFrom >= #effectiveFrom# #effectiveTo# <= IFNULL(effectiveTo, "9999-12-31") createBy = #createBy# createTime = #createTime# updateBy = #updateBy# updateTime = #updateTime#

select count(1) from pm_subcontract_facilitator
id = #id# code = #code# account = #account# name like concat("%", #name#, "%") bankInfo like concat("%", #bankInfo#, "%") bankAccount = #bankAccount# receiver = #receiver# email = #email# state = #state# effectiveFrom >= #effectiveFrom# #effectiveTo# <= IFNULL(effectiveTo, "9999-12-31") createBy = #createBy# createTime = #createTime# updateBy = #updateBy# updateTime = #updateTime#
sqlMap.sql: id, subcontractId, paymentId, fileName, filePath, type, uploadBy, uploadTime, effectiveFrom, effectiveTo, customInfo
sqlMap.select:
select
from pm_subcontract_deliver_files where id = #id#
sqlMap.insert:
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into pm_subcontract_deliver_files (subcontractId, paymentId, fileName, filePath, type, uploadBy, uploadTime, effectiveFrom, effectiveTo, customInfo) values (#subcontractId#, #paymentId#, #fileName#, #filePath#, #type#, #uploadBy#, #uploadTime#, #effectiveFrom#, #effectiveTo#, #customInfo#)

SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into pm_subcontract_deliver_files
subcontractId paymentId fileName filePath type uploadBy uploadTime effectiveFrom effectiveTo customInfo
#subcontractId# #paymentId# #fileName# #filePath# #type# #uploadBy# #uploadTime# #effectiveFrom# #effectiveTo# #customInfo#
sqlMap.update:
update pm_subcontract_deliver_files
subcontractId = #subcontractId# paymentId = #paymentId# fileName = #fileName# filePath = #filePath# type = #type# uploadBy = #uploadBy# uploadTime = #uploadTime# effectiveFrom = #effectiveFrom# effectiveTo = #effectiveTo#
customInfo = JSON_MERGE_PATCH(IFNULL(customInfo, "{}"), #customInfo:JSON# )
where id = #id#

update pm_subcontract_deliver_files set subcontractId = #subcontractId#, paymentId = #paymentId#, fileName = #fileName#, filePath = #filePath#, type = #type#, uploadBy = #uploadBy#, uploadTime = #uploadTime#, effectiveFrom = #effectiveFrom#, effectiveTo = #effectiveTo#,
customInfo = JSON_MERGE_PATCH(IFNULL(customInfo, "{}"), #customInfo:JSON# ) where id = #id#
sqlMap.select:
select * from pm_subcontract_deliver_files
id = #id# subcontractId = #subcontractId# paymentId = #paymentId# fileName = #fileName# filePath = #filePath# type = #type# uploadBy = #uploadBy# uploadTime = #uploadTime# effectiveFrom >= #effectiveFrom# #effectiveTo# <= IFNULL(effectiveTo, "9999-12-31")

select count(1) from pm_subcontract_deliver_files
id = #id# subcontractId = #subcontractId# paymentId = #paymentId# fileName = #fileName# filePath = #filePath# type = #type# uploadBy = #uploadBy# uploadTime = #uploadTime# effectiveFrom >= #effectiveFrom# #effectiveTo# <= IFNULL(effectiveTo, "9999-12-31")

SELECT fl.*, CASE WHEN ui.username IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(ui.username, "-", ui.realName) ELSE fl.uploadBy END AS uploadName, IFNULL(bd.`basicDataName`, fl.type) AS typeName FROM pm_subcontract_deliver_files fl LEFT JOIN `fnd_basic_data` bd ON fl.`type` = bd.`basicDataId` AND bd.`dataTypeCode` = 'subcontractDeliverState' LEFT JOIN fnd_user_info ui ON ui.`username` = fl.`uploadBy`
fl.id = #id# fl.subcontractId = #subcontractId# fl.paymentId = #paymentId# fl.fileName = #fileName# fl.filePath = #filePath# fl.type = #type# fl.uploadBy = #uploadBy# fl.uploadTime = #uploadTime# fl.effectiveFrom >= #effectiveFrom# #effectiveTo# <= IFNULL(fl.effectiveTo, "9999-12-31")
sqlMap.sql: id, subcontractId, ratio, amount, confirmTime, paymentTime, remark, sseId, createTime, createBy, updateTime, updateBy, customInfo
sqlMap.select:
select
from pm_subcontract_project_payment where id = #id#
sqlMap.insert:
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into pm_subcontract_project_payment (subcontractId, ratio, amount, confirmTime, paymentTime, remark, sseId, createTime, createBy, updateTime, updateBy, customInfo ) values (#subcontractId#, #ratio#, FORMAT(REPLACE(#amount#, ",", ""), 2), #confirmTime#, #paymentTime#, #remark#, #sseId#, #createTime#, #createBy#, #updateTime#, #updateBy#, #customInfo:JSON# )

SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into pm_subcontract_project_payment
subcontractId ratio amount confirmTime paymentTime remark sseId createTime createBy updateTime updateBy customInfo
#subcontractId# #ratio# FORMAT(REPLACE(#amount#, ",", ""), 2) #confirmTime# #paymentTime# #remark# #sseId# #createTime# #createBy# #updateTime# #updateBy# #customInfo:JSON#
sqlMap.update:
update pm_subcontract_project_payment
subcontractId = #subcontractId# ratio = #ratio# amount = FORMAT(REPLACE(#amount#, ",", ""), 2) confirmTime = #confirmTime# paymentTime = #paymentTime# remark = #remark# sseId = #sseId# createTime = #createTime# createBy = #createBy# updateTime = #updateTime# updateBy = #updateBy#
customInfo = JSON_MERGE_PATCH(IFNULL(customInfo, "{}"), #customInfo:JSON# )
where id = #id#

update pm_subcontract_project_payment set subcontractId = #subcontractId#, ratio = #ratio#, amount = FORMAT(REPLACE(#amount#, ",", ""), 2), confirmTime = #confirmTime#, paymentTime = #paymentTime#, remark = #remark#, sseId = #sseId#, createTime = #createTime#, createBy = #createBy#, updateTime = #updateTime#, updateBy = #updateBy#,
customInfo = JSON_MERGE_PATCH(IFNULL(customInfo, "{}"), #customInfo:JSON# ) where id = #id#
sqlMap.select:
select * from pm_subcontract_project_payment
id = #id# subcontractId = #subcontractId# ratio = #ratio# amount = #amount# confirmTime = #confirmTime# paymentTime = #paymentTime# remark = #remark# createTime = #createTime# createBy = #createBy# updateTime = #updateTime# updateBy = #updateBy# customInfo = #customInfo:JSON#

select count(1) from pm_subcontract_project_payment
id = #id# subcontractId = #subcontractId# ratio = #ratio# amount = #amount# confirmTime = #confirmTime# paymentTime = #paymentTime# remark = #remark# createTime = #createTime# createBy = #createBy# updateTime = #updateTime# updateBy = #updateBy# customInfo = #customInfo:JSON#
sqlMap.sql: id, subcontractId, taskKey, taskId, quesnaireId, quesnaireVersion, quesnaireState, createBy, createTime, updateBy, updateTime, effectiveFrom, effectiveTo, customInfo
sqlMap.select:
select
from pm_subcontract_project_callback where id = #id#
sqlMap.insert:
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into pm_subcontract_project_callback (subcontractId, taskKey, taskId, quesnaireId, quesnaireVersion, quesnaireState, createBy, createTime, updateBy, updateTime, effectiveFrom, effectiveTo, customInfo) values (#subcontractId#, #taskKey#, #taskId#, #quesnaireId#, #quesnaireVersion#, #quesnaireState#, #createBy#, #createTime#, #updateBy#, #updateTime#, #effectiveFrom#, #effectiveTo#, #customInfo#)

SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into pm_subcontract_project_callback
subcontractId taskKey taskId quesnaireId quesnaireVersion quesnaireState createBy createTime updateBy updateTime effectiveFrom effectiveTo customInfo
#subcontractId# #taskKey# #taskId# #quesnaireId# #quesnaireVersion# #quesnaireState# #createBy# #createTime# #updateBy# #updateTime# #effectiveFrom# #effectiveTo#
customInfo = JSON_MERGE_PATCH(IFNULL(customInfo, "{}"), #customInfo:JSON# )
sqlMap.update:
update pm_subcontract_project_callback
subcontractId = #subcontractId# taskKey = #taskKey# taskId = #taskId# quesnaireId = #quesnaireId# quesnaireVersion = #quesnaireVersion# quesnaireState = #quesnaireState# createBy = #createBy# createTime = #createTime# updateBy = #updateBy# updateTime = #updateTime# effectiveFrom = #effectiveFrom# effectiveTo = #effectiveTo#
customInfo = JSON_MERGE_PATCH(IFNULL(customInfo, "{}"), #customInfo:JSON# )
where id = #id#

update pm_subcontract_project_callback set subcontractId = #subcontractId#, taskKey = #taskKey#, taskId = #taskId#, quesnaireId = #quesnaireId#, quesnaireVersion = #quesnaireVersion#, quesnaireState = #quesnaireState#, createBy = #createBy#, createTime = #createTime#, updateBy = #updateBy#, updateTime = #updateTime#, effectiveFrom = #effectiveFrom#, effectiveTo = #effectiveTo#, customInfo = JSON_MERGE_PATCH(IFNULL(customInfo, "{}"), #customInfo:JSON# where id = #id#
sqlMap.select:
select * from pm_subcontract_project_callback spc
id = #id# subcontractId = #subcontractId# taskKey = #taskKey# taskId = #taskId# quesnaireId = #quesnaireId# quesnaireVersion = #quesnaireVersion# quesnaireState = #quesnaireState# createBy = #createBy# createTime = #createTime# updateBy = #updateBy# updateTime = #updateTime# effectiveFrom >= #effectiveFrom# #effectiveTo# <= IFNULL(effectiveTo, "9999-12-31")
#customInfo.iterator[].value# = spc.customInfo ->> '$$.$customInfo.iterator[].key$'

select count(1) from pm_subcontract_project_callback spc
id = #id# subcontractId = #subcontractId# taskKey = #taskKey# taskId = #taskId# quesnaireId = #quesnaireId# quesnaireVersion = #quesnaireVersion# quesnaireState = #quesnaireState# createBy = #createBy# createTime = #createTime# updateBy = #updateBy# updateTime = #updateTime# effectiveFrom >= #effectiveFrom# #effectiveTo# <= IFNULL(effectiveTo, "9999-12-31")
#customInfo.iterator[].value# = spc.customInfo ->> '$$.$customInfo.iterator[].key$'

select * from pm_subcontract_project_callback spc
id = #id# subcontractId = #subcontractId# taskKey = #taskKey# taskId = #taskId# quesnaireId = #quesnaireId# quesnaireVersion = #quesnaireVersion# quesnaireState = #quesnaireState# createBy = #createBy# createTime = #createTime# updateBy = #updateBy# updateTime = #updateTime# effectiveFrom >= #effectiveFrom# #effectiveTo# <= IFNULL(effectiveTo, "9999-12-31")
#customInfo.iterator[].value# = spc.customInfo ->> '$$.$customInfo.iterator[].key$'
order by createTime desc limit 1

SELECT id FROM pm_subcontract_project_callback WHERE subcontractId = #subcontractId# AND taskId = #taskId#
taskKey = #taskKey#

SELECT quesnaireId FROM pm_subcontract_project_callback WHERE subcontractId = #subcontractId# AND taskId = #taskId#
taskKey = #taskKey#

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pm_subcontract_project_callback WHERE subcontractId = #subcontractId#
taskKey = #taskKey#
sqlMap.sql: id, subcontractName, contractNos, projectIds, type, state, callbackState, facilitatorId, facilitatorName, bankInfo, bankAccount, officeCode, profitDepCode, subcontractNo, isAccrued, subcontractAmount, reason, remark, effectiveFrom, effectiveTo, createBy, createTime, updateBy, updateTime
sqlMap.select:
select
from pm_subcontract_project_price where id = #id#
sqlMap.insert:
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into pm_subcontract_project_price (subcontractId, contractNo, orderExecNumber, projectCode, engineeFee, objId, procType, price, createTime, createBy, updateTime, updateBy ) values (#subcontractId#, #contractNo#, #orderExecNumber#, #projectCode#, #engineeFee#, #objId#, #procType#, #price#, #createTime#, #createBy#, #updateTime#, #updateBy# )

SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into pm_subcontract_project_price
subcontractId contractNo orderExecNumber projectCode engineeFee objId procType price createTime createBy updateTime updateBy
#subcontractId# #contractNo# #orderExecNumber# #projectCode# #engineeFee# #objId# #procType# #price# #createTime# #createBy# #updateTime# #updateBy#
sqlMap.update:
update pm_subcontract_project_price
subcontractId = #subcontractId# contractNo = #contractNo# orderExecNumber = #orderExecNumber# projectCode = #projectCode# engineeFee = #engineeFee# objId = #objId# procType = #procType# price = #price# createTime = #createTime# createBy = #createBy# updateTime = #updateTime# updateBy = #updateBy#
where id = #id#

update pm_subcontract_project_price set subcontractId = #subcontractId#, contractNo = #contractNo#, orderExecNumber = #orderExecNumber#, projectCode = #projectCode#, engineeFee = #engineeFee#, objId = #objId#, procType = #procType#, price = #price#, createTime = #createTime#, createBy = #createBy#, updateTime = #updateTime#, updateBy = #updateBy# where id = #id#
sqlMap.select:
select * from pm_subcontract_project_price
id = #id# subcontractId = #subcontractId# contractNo = #contractNo# orderExecNumber = #orderExecNumber# projectCode = #projectCode# engineeFee = #engineeFee# objId = #objId# procType = #procType# price = #price# createTime = #createTime# createBy = #createBy# updateTime = #updateTime# updateBy = #updateBy#

select count(1) from pm_subcontract_project_price
id = #id# subcontractId = #subcontractId# contractNo = #contractNo# orderExecNumber = #orderExecNumber# projectCode = #projectCode# engineeFee = #engineeFee# objId = #objId# procType = #procType# price = #price# createTime = #createTime# createBy = #createBy# updateTime = #updateTime# updateBy = #updateBy#

select * from ( SELECT `ph`.`projectId` AS `projectId`, `ph`.`projectCode` AS `projectCode`, `rank`.`basicDataName` AS `rank`, ( CASE WHEN ( `pr`.`mergeBranchMark` IS NOT NULL ) THEN CONCAT( `ph`.`projectName`, '-', `pr`.`mergeBranchMark` ) ELSE `ph`.`projectName` END ) AS `projectName`, `fd`.`basicDataName` AS `projectStateName`, `ph`.`projectState` AS `projectState`, GROUP_CONCAT( DISTINCT `pc`.`contractNo` SEPARATOR ',' ) AS `contractNo`, `ph`.`column001` AS `officeCode`, `d`.`departmentName` AS `officeName` FROM `pm_project_header` `ph` LEFT JOIN `pm_project_group_relationship` `pr` ON ( ( `ph`.`projectCode` = `pr`.`projectCode` ) ) LEFT JOIN `pm_project_contract` `pc` ON ( ( `pr`.`projectGroupCode` = `pc`.`projectGroupCode` ) ) LEFT JOIN `pm_project_group` `pg` ON ( `pr`.`projectGroupCode` = `pg`.`projectGroupCode` ) AND (`pg`.`projectType` = '10') LEFT JOIN `fnd_basic_data` `fd` ON ( `fd`.`basicDataId` = `ph`.`projectState` ) AND (`fd`.`dataTypeCode` = '02') AND (`fd`.`effectiveFrom` < NOW()) AND ( (`fd`.`effectiveTo` > NOW()) OR ISNULL(`fd`.`effectiveTo`) ) LEFT JOIN `fnd_basic_data` `rank` ON ( `ph`.`column010` = `rank`.`basicDataId` ) AND (`rank`.`dataTypeCode` = '05') AND (`rank`.`effectiveFrom` <= NOW()) AND ( (`rank`.`effectiveTo` > NOW()) OR ISNULL(`rank`.`effectiveTo`) ) LEFT JOIN `fnd_department` `d` ON ( `d`.`departmentNum` = `ph`.`column001` ) where ISNULL(`ph`.`effectiveTo`)
FIND_IN_SET(`ph`.projectId, #projectIds#)
GROUP BY `ph`.`projectCode` ) t
contractNo like CONCAT('%', #contractNos[]#, '%')
FIND_IN_SET(projectId, #projectIds#)

SELECT *, `rank`.`basicDataName` AS `rank`, `fd`.`basicDataName` AS `projectStateName`, `d`.`departmentName` AS `officeName` FROM (SELECT `ph`.`projectId` AS `projectId`, `ph`.`projectCode` AS `projectCode`, ( CASE WHEN ( `pr`.`mergeBranchMark` IS NOT NULL ) THEN CONCAT( `ph`.`projectName`, '-', `pr`.`mergeBranchMark` ) ELSE `ph`.`projectName` END ) AS `projectName`, `ph`.`projectState` AS `projectState`, GROUP_CONCAT( DISTINCT `pc`.`contractNo` SEPARATOR ',' ) AS `contractNo`, `ph`.`column001` AS `officeCode`, ph.`column010`, ph.salesType FROM `pm_project_header` `ph` LEFT JOIN `pm_project_group_relationship` `pr` ON ( ( `ph`.`projectCode` = `pr`.`projectCode` ) ) LEFT JOIN `pm_project_contract` `pc` ON ( ( `pr`.`projectGroupCode` = `pc`.`projectGroupCode` ) ) LEFT JOIN `pm_project_group` `pg` ON ( `pr`.`projectGroupCode` = `pg`.`projectGroupCode` ) AND (`pg`.`projectType` = '10') WHERE ISNULL(`ph`.`effectiveTo`) FIND_IN_SET(`ph`.projectId, #projectIds#)
`ph`.projectId = -1
#projectIdList[]#
GROUP BY `ph`.`projectCode` ) t
LEFT JOIN `fnd_basic_data` `fd` ON ( `fd`.`basicDataId` = `t`.`projectState` ) AND (`fd`.`dataTypeCode` = '02') AND (`fd`.`effectiveFrom` < NOW()) AND ( (`fd`.`effectiveTo` > NOW()) OR ISNULL(`fd`.`effectiveTo`) ) LEFT JOIN `fnd_basic_data` `rank` ON ( `t`.`column010` = `rank`.`basicDataId` ) AND (`rank`.`dataTypeCode` = '05') AND (`rank`.`effectiveFrom` <= NOW()) AND ( (`rank`.`effectiveTo` > NOW()) OR ISNULL(`rank`.`effectiveTo`) ) LEFT JOIN `fnd_department` `d` ON ( `d`.`departmentNum` = `t`.`officeCode` )
contractNo like CONCAT('%', #contractNos[]#, '%')
#projectIdList[]#
FIND_IN_SET(projectId, #projectIds#)
projectId = -1

select * from ( SELECT DISTINCT vsip.contract_code contractNo, vsip.barcode barCode, vsip.itemCode itemCode, vsip.itemName itemName, NULL AS chProjectId, NULL AS chContractNo, NULL AS transferProjectId, NULL AS transferContractNo, -1 AS transferFlag, vsip.barcode2 barCode2, vsip.itemCode2 itemCode2, vsip.itemName2 itemName2 FROM view_shipment_info_4_pm vsip LEFT JOIN view_shipment_ems_4_pm vsep ON vsep.contract_code = vsip.contract_code AND vsep.packId = vsip.packId WHERE vsip.contract_code in ($contractNos$) AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM pm_project_shipment pps1 WHERE vsip.barcode = pps1.barcode and contractNo in ($contractNos$) and projectId in ($projectIds$) )
vsip.contract_code = #contractProfitCenter[].sourceContractNo#
vsip.`profitCenter` = #contractProfitCenter[].officeCode#
UNION ALL SELECT pps.`contractNo`,pps.`barcode`,pps.`itemCode`,pps.`itemName`, pps.chProjectId, pps.chContractNo, pps.transferProjectId, pps.transferContractNo, pps.transferFlag, sbr.sn2 AS barCode2, sbr.item2 AS itemCode2, fi.describe_ AS itemName2 FROM pm_project_shipment pps LEFT JOIN `fb_shipment_barcode_relation` sbr ON sbr.contract = REPLACE(pps.contractNo, '-C', '') AND pps.barcode = sbr.sn1 LEFT JOIN `fb_items` fi ON fi.item = sbr.item2 WHERE contractNo in ($contractNos$) and projectId in ($projectIds$) transferFlag != 1 AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM view_shipment_info_4_pm vsip LEFT JOIN view_shipment_ems_4_pm vsep ON vsep.contract_code = vsip.contract_code AND vsep.packId = vsip.packId WHERE vsip.contract_code IN ($sourceContractNos$)
AND vsip.barcode = pps.barcode) ORDER BY transferFlag asc) t order by t.contractNo, t.itemCode

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM `pm_subcontract_project_header` WHERE subcontractName LIKE CONCAT(#subcontractName# , "%")
id != #id#

SELECT pfs.`orderExecNumber`, dfs.`contractNo`, pfs.`projectCode`, CASE WHEN pfs.`engineeFee` IS NOT NULL THEN pfs.engineeFee ELSE 0 END AS engineeFee, pfs.`objId`, pfs.`applyType` as procType FROM `pm_project_property_from_sms` pfs LEFT JOIN `pm_order_data_from_sap` dfs ON pfs.`orderExecNumber` = dfs.`orderExecNumber` WHERE dfs.`contractNo` IS NOT NULL AND FIND_IN_SET(dfs.contractNo, #contractNos#)

SELECT t.`orderExecNumber`, t.`contractNo`, t.`projectCode`, t.engineeFee, t.`objId`, t.procType spp.`id`, spp.subcontractId, spp.`price` FROM (SELECT MAX(pfs.`orderExecNumber`) AS `orderExecNumber`, dfs.`contractNo`, pfs.`projectCode`, CASE WHEN pfs.`engineeFee` IS NOT NULL THEN pfs.engineeFee ELSE 0 END AS engineeFee, pfs.`objId`, pfs.`applyType` AS procType FROM `pm_project_property_from_sms` pfs LEFT JOIN `pm_order_data_from_sap` dfs ON pfs.`orderExecNumber` = dfs.`orderExecNumber` WHERE dfs.`contractNo` IS NOT NULL AND FIND_IN_SET(dfs.contractNo, #contractNos#) GROUP BY dfs.contractNo, pfs.projectCode, pfs.objId, pfs.applyType) t
LEFT JOIN `pm_subcontract_project_price` spp ON t.`orderExecNumber` = spp.`orderExecNumber` AND t.contractNo = spp.contractNo AND t.projectCode = spp.`projectCode` AND spp.subcontractId = #subcontractId# AND FIND_IN_SET(spp.contractNo, #contractNos#)
order by t.contractNo, t.orderExecNumber
sqlMap.insert:
insert into pm_cl_evaluation_header (projectCode ,status ,createdTime ,evaluationScore , evaluationTime ,evaluationPeopleName ,evaluationPeopleId,createdPerson ,updatedPerson ,evaluationComment ,evaluationResult , nextAcceptPerson ,nextAcceptPersonName,evaluationType ,updatedTime ,applyHeaderId , projectId ,projectName, subcontractId, subcontractName) values (#projectCode# ,#status# ,now() ,#evaluationScore# ,
now() #evaluationTime#
,#evaluationPeopleName# ,#evaluationPeopleId#,#createdPerson# ,null ,#evaluationComment# ,#evaluationResult# , #nextAcceptPerson# ,#nextAcceptPersonName#,#evaluationType# ,null ,#applyHeaderId#, #projectId# ,#projectName#, #subcontractId#, #subcontractName#)
SELECT last_insert_id() as id ;
sqlMap.update:
update pm_cl_evaluation_header set status=#status#
evaluationScore = #evaluationScore#
applyHeaderId = #applyHeaderId#
procInstId= #procInstId#
,evaluationTime=now(), evaluationPeopleName=#evaluationPeopleName#,evaluationPeopleId=#evaluationPeopleId#, updatedPerson=#updatedPerson#,evaluationComment=#evaluationComment#,evaluationResult=#evaluationResult#, nextAcceptPerson=#nextAcceptPerson#,nextAcceptPersonName=#nextAcceptPersonName#,updatedTime=now() where id=#id#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT DISTINCT h.id AS subcontractId, h.contractNos, h.subcontractNo, h.subcontractName, h.officeCode, dep.departmentName AS officeName, h.profitDepCode, dep2.departmentName AS profitDepName, D.KEY_ AS processKey, D.NAME_ AS processName, RES.ID_ AS taskId, RES.NAME_ AS taskName, CASE WHEN RES.ASSIGNEE_ = 'emlRole' THEN '工程管理部主管' WHEN RES.ASSIGNEE_ = 'emRole' THEN '工程管理部' WHEN RES.ASSIGNEE_ = 'cbRole' THEN '回访人员' WHEN RES.ASSIGNEE_ = 'zrRole' THEN '办事处主任' ELSE IFNULL(fr.roleName, CONCAT(ui.username, '-', ui.realName)) END AS assigneeName, RES.CREATE_TIME_ AS createTime , h.customInfo ->> '$$.purchId' AS purchId , hp.id AS paymentId , hp.ratio AS paymentRatio , hp.amount AS paymentAmount , hp.remark AS paymentRemark , hp.customInfo ->> '$$.status' AS paymentStatus , fc.abbr AS compAbbr FROM ACT_RU_TASK RES INNER JOIN ACT_RU_VARIABLE A0 ON RES.PROC_INST_ID_ = A0.PROC_INST_ID_ INNER JOIN ACT_RE_PROCDEF D ON RES.PROC_DEF_ID_ = D.ID_ INNER JOIN `pm_subcontract_project_header` h ON h.`id` = A0.`LONG_` AND A0.NAME_ = 'subcontractId' AND A0.TASK_ID_ IS NULL AND A0.NAME_ = 'subcontractId' AND A0.TYPE_ = 'integer' AND h.effectiveTo IS NULL LEFT JOIN `pm_subcontract_project_payment` hp ON h.`id` = hp.subcontractId AND D.KEY_ = 'SubcontractInspection' AND hp.confirmTime IS NULL LEFT JOIN fnd_user_info ui ON RES.`ASSIGNEE_` = ui.`username` AND ui.`status` = 1 LEFT JOIN `fnd_roles` fr ON RES.ASSIGNEE_ = CONCAT('role_', fr.id) LEFT JOIN fnd_department dep ON h.`officeCode` = dep.`departmentNum` AND dep.`status` = 1 LEFT JOIN fnd_department dep2 ON h.profitDepCode = dep2.`departmentNum`
AND dep.`status` = 1 LEFT JOIN `fnd_company` fc ON fc.id = h.orgId WHERE RES.SUSPENSION_STATE_ = 1
D.KEY_ = #processKey#
D.KEY_ in ('Subcontract', 'SubcontractCallBack', 'SubcontractInspection')
RES.ID_ = #taskId#
RES.TASK_DEF_KEY_ = #taskKey#
AND (
(RES.ASSIGNEE_ = #assignee# OR (RES.ASSIGNEE_ IS NULL AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ACT_RU_IDENTITYLINK I LEFT JOIN `act_id_group` g ON g.`ID_` = i.`GROUP_ID_` AND i.`TYPE_` = 'candidate' LEFT JOIN `act_id_membership` im ON im.`GROUP_ID_` = g.`ID_` WHERE I.TASK_ID_ = RES.ID_ AND I.TYPE_ = 'candidate' AND (I.USER_ID_ = #assignee# OR im.`USER_ID_` = #assignee#) ) ) )
RES.ASSIGNEE_ = #roleGroups[].roleGroup#
( FIND_IN_SET(h.`officeCode`, #areaPower#) OR FIND_IN_SET(h.`profitDepCode`, #areaPower#) OR FIND_IN_SET(h.customInfo ->> '$$.parentOfficeCode', #areaPower#) )
FIND_IN_SET(h.`officeCode`, #areaPower#)
FIND_IN_SET(h.`profitDepCode`, #areaPower#)
FIND_IN_SET(h.customInfo ->> '$$.parentOfficeCode', #areaPower#)
) h.subcontractName like concat("%", #subcontractName#, "%") (h.contractNos like concat("%", #contractNos#, "%") or h.subcontractNo like concat("%", #contractNos#, "%")) h.facilitatorName like concat("%", #facilitatorName#, "%") h.officeCode = #officeCode# h.profitDepCode = #profitDepCode# h.subcontractNo = #subcontractNo# h.orgId = #orgId#
#purchId# = h.`customInfo` ->> '$$.purchId' ORDER BY RES.CREATE_TIME_ DESC

SELECT DISTINCT h.id AS subcontractId, h.contractNos, h.subcontractNo, h.subcontractName, h.officeCode, dep.departmentName AS officeName, h.profitDepCode, dep2.departmentName AS profitDepName, "Subcontract" AS processKey, "项目转包流程" AS processName, -1 AS taskId, "重新发起申请" AS taskName, "服务经理" AS assigneeName, NULL AS createTime FROM `pm_subcontract_project_header` h LEFT JOIN fnd_department dep ON h.`officeCode` = dep.`departmentNum` AND dep.`status` = 1 LEFT JOIN fnd_department dep2 ON h.profitDepCode = dep2.`departmentNum` AND dep2.isParam = 1 AND dep.`status` = 1 WHERE h.`state` < 0 AND FIND_IN_SET(h.`officeCode`, #areaPower#) AND h.effectiveTo IS NULL
h.subcontractName like concat("%", #subcontractName#, "%") (h.contractNos like concat("%", #contractNos#, "%") or h.subcontractNo like concat("%", #contractNos#, "%")) h.facilitatorName like concat("%", #facilitatorName#, "%") h.officeCode = #officeCode# h.profitDepCode = #profitDepCode# h.subcontractNo = #subcontractNo# h.orgId = #orgId#
#purchId# = h.`customInfo` ->> '$$.purchId'

SELECT DISTINCT RES.* FROM ACT_RU_TASK RES INNER JOIN ACT_RU_VARIABLE A0 ON RES.PROC_INST_ID_ = A0.PROC_INST_ID_ INNER JOIN ACT_RE_PROCDEF D ON RES.PROC_DEF_ID_ = D.ID_ INNER JOIN `pm_subcontract_project_header` h ON h.`id` = A0.`LONG_` AND A0.NAME_ = 'subcontractId' AND A0.TASK_ID_ IS NULL AND A0.NAME_ = 'subcontractId' AND A0.TYPE_ = 'integer' AND h.effectiveTo IS NULL WHERE RES.SUSPENSION_STATE_ = 1
D.KEY_ = #processKey#
D.KEY_ in ('Subcontract', 'SubcontractCallBack', 'SubcontractInspection')
RES.ID_ = #taskId#
RES.TASK_DEF_KEY_ = #taskKey[]#
(A0.NAME_ = 'subcontractId' AND A0.TYPE_ = 'integer' AND A0.LONG_ = #subcontractId# )
AND (
1 = 1
(RES.ASSIGNEE_ = #assignee# OR (RES.ASSIGNEE_ IS NULL AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ACT_RU_IDENTITYLINK I LEFT JOIN `act_id_group` g ON g.`ID_` = i.`GROUP_ID_` AND i.`TYPE_` = 'candidate' LEFT JOIN `act_id_membership` im ON im.`GROUP_ID_` = g.`ID_` WHERE I.TASK_ID_ = RES.ID_ AND I.TYPE_ = 'candidate' AND (I.USER_ID_ = #assignee# OR im.`USER_ID_` = #assignee#) ) ) )
FIND_IN_SET(RES.ASSIGNEE_, #roleGroup# )
( FIND_IN_SET(h.`officeCode`, #areaPower#) OR FIND_IN_SET(h.`profitDepCode`, #areaPower#) OR FIND_IN_SET(h.customInfo ->> '$$.parentOfficeCode', #areaPower#) )
FIND_IN_SET(h.`officeCode`, #areaPower#)
FIND_IN_SET(h.`profitDepCode`, #areaPower#)
FIND_IN_SET(h.customInfo ->> '$$.parentOfficeCode', #areaPower#)
RES.ASSIGNEE_ = #roleGroups[].roleGroup#
( FIND_IN_SET(h.`officeCode`, #areaPower#) OR FIND_IN_SET(h.`profitDepCode`, #areaPower#) OR FIND_IN_SET(h.customInfo ->> '$$.parentOfficeCode', #areaPower#) )
FIND_IN_SET(h.`officeCode`, #areaPower#)
FIND_IN_SET(h.`profitDepCode`, #areaPower#)
FIND_IN_SET(h.customInfo ->> '$$.parentOfficeCode', #areaPower#)
) ORDER BY RES.CREATE_TIME_ DESC

SELECT rp.NAME_ AS processName, bd.basicDataName AS statusName, ht.NAME_ AS taskName, ach.message AS 'comment', ach.assigneeTime, CASE WHEN ach.`procdefKey` = 'SubcontractCallback' THEN spc.subcontractId ELSE ach.objId END AS subcontractId, CASE WHEN ach.taskId = spc.taskId THEN spc.quesnaireId ELSE NULL END AS quesnaireId, CASE WHEN ui.username IS NULL THEN ach.assignee ELSE CONCAT(ach.assignee, "-", ui.realName) END AS assigneeName, ach.nextAssignee, ach.nextAssigneeName FROM `fnd_act_hi_comment` ach LEFT JOIN `pm_subcontract_project_callback` spc ON ach.`objId` = spc.`id` AND ach.`procdefKey` = 'SubcontractCallback'
LEFT JOIN `fnd_basic_data` bd ON bd.dataTypeCode = 'subcontractWorkFlowState' AND bd.basicDataId = ach.result LEFT JOIN fnd_user_info ui ON ui.username = ach.assignee LEFT JOIN `act_hi_taskinst` ht ON ht.ID_ = ach.taskId AND ht.PROC_INST_ID_ = ach.instId LEFT JOIN `act_re_procdef` rp ON rp.ID_ = ht.PROC_DEF_ID_ WHERE ( ach.`procdefKey` = 'SubcontractCallback' spc.`subcontractId` = #subcontractId# ) OR ( ach.`procdefKey` in ('Subcontract', 'SubcontractInspection') ach.`objId` = #subcontractId# ) ORDER BY ach.`assigneeTime` ASC

SELECT h.*, d.`departmentName` AS officeName, d1.`departmentName` AS profitDepName, bd.`basicDataName` AS stateName, bd1.`basicDataName` AS callbackStateName, bd2.basicDataName as typeName, CONCAT(h.createBy, "-", ui.`realName`) AS createName FROM pm_subcontract_project_header h LEFT JOIN fnd_department d ON h.`officeCode` = d.`departmentNum` LEFT JOIN fnd_department d1 ON h.`profitDepCode` = d1.`departmentNum` LEFT JOIN `fnd_basic_data` bd ON h.`state` = bd.`basicDataId` AND bd.`dataTypeCode` = 'subcontractState' LEFT JOIN `fnd_basic_data` bd1 ON h.`callbackState` = bd1.`basicDataId` AND bd1.`dataTypeCode` = 'subcontractCbState' LEFT JOIN `fnd_basic_data` bd2 ON h.`type` = bd2.`basicDataId` AND bd2.`dataTypeCode` = 'subcontractType' LEFT JOIN fnd_user_info ui ON ui.`username` = h.`createBy` WHERE h.`effectiveTo` IS NULL AND FIND_IN_SET(#projectIds#, h.projectIds);

select h.`contractNos`, h.`subcontractNo`, h.`subcontractName`, bd.`basicDataName` AS typeName, h.`facilitatorName`, h.`subcontractAmount`, office.`departmentName` AS officeName, profitDep.`departmentName` AS profitDepName, h.reason, h.`createTime`, CONCAT(h.createBy, "-", ui.`realName`) AS createName, h.customInfo zrTask.zrApproverTime h.zrApproveTime as zrApproverTime, bd1.`basicDataName` AS stateName, bd2.`basicDataName` AS callbackStateName, h.`isAccrued`, h.`isInvoiced`, pp.confirmTime, CONCAT( ROUND( pp.paidAmount / CONVERT( REPLACE(h.subcontractAmount, ',', ''), DECIMAL (25, 2) ) * 100, 2 ), "%" ) AS paidRatio, pp.paidAmount, pp.paymentTime, pp.remark, pp.customInfo AS extInfo , h.orgId from `pm_subcontract_project_header` h
left join (select objId as subcontractId, max(assigneeTime) as zrApproverTime from `fnd_act_hi_comment` where result = 1 and taskKey = 'approveZRTask' and procdefKey = 'Subcontract' group by procdefKey, objId) zrTask on zrTask.subcontractId = h.`id`
left join (select t.`subcontractId`, t.confirmTime, t.paymentTime, t.remark, maxPay.paidAmount, t.customInfo from `pm_subcontract_project_payment` t inner join (select
max(id) AS maxPayId, sum( if( paymentTime is not null, convert( replace(IFNULL(customInfo ->> '$$.paidAmount', amount), ",", ""), DECIMAL (25, 2) ), 0 ) ) as paidAmount from `pm_subcontract_project_payment`
group by subcontractId) maxPay on t.id = maxPay.maxPayId) pp on pp.subcontractId = h.id
LEFT JOIN `pm_subcontract_project_payment` p ON h.id = p.`subcontractId`
left join `fnd_basic_data` bd on bd.`basicDataId` = h.`type` and bd.`dataTypeCode` = 'SubcontractType' LEFT JOIN `fnd_basic_data` bd1 ON h.`state` = bd1.`basicDataId` AND bd1.`dataTypeCode` = 'subcontractState' LEFT JOIN `fnd_basic_data` bd2 ON h.`callbackState` = bd2.`basicDataId` AND bd2.`dataTypeCode` = 'subcontractCbState' left join fnd_department office on office.`departmentNum` = h.`officeCode` and office.`status` = 1 left join fnd_department profitDep on profitDep.`departmentNum` = h.`profitDepCode` and profitDep.`status` = 1 LEFT JOIN fnd_user_info ui ON ui.`username` = h.`createBy` where h.effectiveTo is NULL h.id = #id# h.subcontractName like concat("%", #subcontractName#, "%") (h.contractNos like concat("%", #contractNos#, "%") or h.subcontractNo like concat("%", #contractNos#, "%")) h.projectIds like concat("%", #projectIds#, "%") h.type = #type# h.state = #state# callbackState = #callbackState# h.facilitatorId = #facilitatorId# h.facilitatorName like concat("%", #facilitatorName#, "%") h.bankInfo = #bankInfo# h.bankAccount = #bankAccount# h.officeCode = #officeCode# h.profitDepCode = #profitDepCode# h.subcontractNo = #subcontractNo# h.isAccrued = #isAccrued# isInvoiced = #isInvoiced# subcontractAmount = #subcontractAmount# h.reason = #reason# h.remark = #remark# h.effectiveFrom >= #effectiveFrom# #effectiveTo# <= IFNULL(h.effectiveTo, "9999-12-31") h.zrApproveTime = #zrApproveTime# h.createBy = #createBy# h.createTime = #createTime# h.updateBy = #updateBy# h.updateTime = #updateTime# h.orgId = #orgId# (FIND_IN_SET(h.officeCode, #areaPower#) or FIND_IN_SET(h.profitDepCode, #areaPower#)) FIND_IN_SET(#projectId#, h.projectIds) #customInfo.purchId# = h.`customInfo` ->> '$$.purchId'
h.createTime >= #searchStartTime# h.createTime <= #searchEndTime#
zrTask.zrApproverTime >= #searchStartTime# zrTask.zrApproverTime <= #searchEndTime#
h.zrApproveTime >= #searchStartTime# h.zrApproveTime <= #searchEndTime#
p.paymentTime >= #searchStartTime# p.paymentTime <= #searchEndTime# GROUP BY h.id
order by h.id desc
SELECT SUM(REPLACE(amount, ",", "")) as paiedAmount FROM `pm_subcontract_project_payment` WHERE paymentTime IS NOT NULL and subcontractId = #subcontractId# GROUP BY subcontractId

SELECT ph.*, ppp.lastPaymentTime, ppp.monthDiff FROM ACT_RU_TASK ret INNER JOIN ACT_RU_VARIABLE arv ON ret.PROC_INST_ID_ = arv.PROC_INST_ID_ INNER JOIN (SELECT MAX(paymentTime) AS lastPaymentTime, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MONTH, MAX(paymentTime), NOW()) AS monthDiff, subcontractId FROM pm_subcontract_project_payment ppp WHERE paymentTime IS NOT NULL GROUP BY subcontractId) ppp ON ppp.`subcontractId` = arv.`LONG_` AND arv.NAME_ = 'subcontractId' AND arv.TASK_ID_ IS NULL AND arv.NAME_ = 'subcontractId' AND arv.TYPE_ = 'integer' INNER JOIN `pm_subcontract_project_header` ph ON ph.`id` = ppp.`subcontractId` AND ph.`type` = '10' AND ph.effectiveTo is NULL WHERE ret.TASK_DEF_KEY_ = 'applyPaymentTask' AND ppp.monthDiff >= 10 AND DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-%d') = DATE_FORMAT( DATE_ADD( ppp.lastPaymentTime, INTERVAL ppp.monthDiff MONTH ), '%Y-%m-%d' )

SELECT NULL AS id , sph.`id` AS subcontractId, ROUND( spps.`approveAmount` / REPLACE(sph.`subcontractAmount`, ",", "") * 100, 2 ) AS ratio, FORMAT(spps.approveAmount, 2) AS amount, spps.`confirmTime`, spps.`paymentTime`, spps.`remark`, spps.`id` AS sseId, spps.`confirmTime` AS createTime, ui.`username` createBy, NULL AS updateTime, NULL AS updateBy FROM `pm_subcontract_project_payment_sse` spps LEFT JOIN `pm_subcontract_project_header` sph ON sph.`subcontractNo` = REPLACE(spps.`subcontractNo`, " ", "") LEFT JOIN `pm_subcontract_project_payment` spp ON spps.`id` = spp.`sseId` LEFT JOIN fnd_user_info ui ON spps.`workNo` = SUBSTR(ui.`username`, 2) WHERE sph.id IS NOT NULL AND spp.`sseId` IS NULL ORDER BY spps.`confirmTime`, sph.id
sqlMap.update: UPDATE `pm_subcontract_project_payment` spp INNER JOIN `pm_subcontract_project_payment_sse` spps ON spp.`sseId` = spps.`id` SET spp.`paymentTime` = IFNULL(spp.`paymentTime`, spps.`paymentTime`), spp.`remark` = IFNULL(spp.`remark`, spps.`remark`) WHERE spp.`paymentTime` IS NULL
sqlMap.sql: SELECT depNum AS dimDepartment, depName AS dimDepartmentName, buCode AS dimBU, buName AS dimBUName, productLineCode AS dimProductLine, productLineName AS dimProductLineName, officeCode AS dimTerritory, officeName AS dimTerritoryName, industryCode AS dimIndustry,industryName AS dimIndustryName FROM offer_dimension_default_mapping WHERE depNum = #depNum# AND `status` = 1 LIMIT 1
